name: Point4d
summary: Represents the four coordinates of a point in four-dimensional space. The W (fourth) dimension is often considered the weight of the point as seen in 3D space.

constructors.name: Point4d(Point3d)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Point4d class from the coordinates of a point.

constructors.name: Point4d(Point4d)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new point by copying coordinates from another point.

constructors.name: Point4d(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Point4d(double x, double y, double z, double w)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Point4d class based on coordinates.

methods.name: Add
methods.signature: public static Point4d Add(Point4d point1, Point4d point2)
methods.summary: Sums two Point4d together. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the + operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that results from the weighted addition of point1 and point2.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Point4d other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified System.Object is Point4d and has same coordinates as the present point.

returns.doc: true if obj is Point4d and has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Point4d)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified point has same value as the present point.

returns.doc: true if point has the same value as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Computes the hash code for the present point.

returns.doc: A non-unique hash code, which uses all coordinates of this object.

methods.name: Multiply
methods.signature: public static Point4d Multiply(Point4d point, double d)
methods.summary: Multiplies a point by a number. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that results from the coordinate-wise multiplication of point with d.

methods.name: Subtract
methods.signature: public static Point4d Subtract(Point4d point1, Point4d point2)
methods.summary: Subtracts the second point from the first point. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the - operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that results from the weighted subtraction of point2 from point1.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.summary: Returns the fully qualified type name of this instance.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms the present point in place. The transformation matrix acts on the left of the point. i.e., result = transformation*point

methods.name: Addition
methods.signature: public static Point4d operator +(Point4d point1, Point4d point2)

returns.doc: A new point that results from the weighted addition of point1 and point2.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Point4d a, Point4d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point4d have equal values.

returns.doc: true if the coordinates of the two points are equal; otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Point4d a, Point4d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point4d have different values.

returns.doc: true if the two points differ in any coordinate; false otherwise.

methods.name: Multiply(Point4d, Point4d)
methods.signature: public static double operator *(Point4d point1, Point4d point2)
methods.summary: Multiplies two Point4d together, returning the dot (internal) product of the two. This is not the cross product.

returns.doc: A value that results from the coordinate-wise multiplication of point1 and point2.

methods.name: Multiply(Point4d, Double)
methods.signature: public static Point4d operator *(Point4d point, double d)
methods.summary: Multiplies a point by a number.

returns.doc: A new point that results from the coordinate-wise multiplication of point with d.

methods.name: Subtraction
methods.signature: public static Point4d operator -(Point4d point1, Point4d point2)
methods.summary: Subtracts the second point from the first point.

returns.doc: A new point that results from the weighted subtraction of point2 from point1.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Returns an indication regarding the validity of this point.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets the value of a point with all coordinates set as RhinoMath.UnsetValue.

properties.name: W
properties.summary: Gets or sets the W (fourth) coordinate -or weight- of this point.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X (first) coordinate of this point.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y (second) coordinate of this point.

properties.name: Z
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z (third) coordinate of this point.
